best_performing_model.name: XGBoost (SMOTE-Tuned)
best_performing_model.rationale: Selected based on F1-score optimization which balances false alarms with positive anomaly sensitivity.

most_influential_features.recommendation: Prioritize monitoring Torque [Nm] and Tool wear [min] sensor thresholds to preempt mechanical failures.

recall_improvement_summary.summary_text: SMOTE resampled training splits increased failure detection recall by 11.76% (from 0.6471 to 0.7647), cutting missed failures dramatically.

threshold_optimization_findings.recommendation: Configure decision boundary threshold to 0.7300000000000004 inside API routes to achieve a balanced 76.47% Recall and 86.67% Precision.
